title: War of the Engines: European Monster Ripped Apart Unreal and Unity While AI Slept
body_markdown:
# 🎮 STATUS: GAME ENGINE WARS — Goblin Intel Report

---

## ⚡ SHADOW BRIEFING

Guerrilla Games (creators of Horizon Zero Dawn) are challenging the two titans — Unreal Engine and Unity. Their answer: **"The Immense Engine"** — a European game engine designed so that AI agents "can do the work of ten or fifteen people."

Two years of engine wars have begun. And no licensing payment will survive this battle.

---

## 🔥 GAME ENGINE WARS CLUSTER: THE GREAT SHADOW BATTLE

### The Immense Engine — European Protest [450 pts / 8 sources]

**"Guerrilla Games co-founder developing European game engine to rival Unreal and Unity."**
**"Former Epic director building a European rival to the Unreal and Unity game engines."**

Two messages from two sources. One story: **defectors from Epic Games have created a European answer**. An engine called "The Immense Engine," positioned as an AI-agent tool where agents do the work of 10-15 developers.

**This is not a competitor.** It is an existential threat to Unity's subscription model and Epic's 5% royalty structure.

### AI + Gaming — Two Sides of One Coin [200 pts / 6 sources]

**"Dragon Quest creator thinks AI pals are 'not just a convenient tool, but a friend.'"**
**"Sony says efficient AI tools will lead to even more games flooding the market."**

Dragon Quest sees AI as a friend to players. Sony warns: more games will flood the market because AI makes games faster. Both are right — just from opposite ends.

---

## 🎮 ADDITIONAL GAMING INDUSTRY SIGNALS

### GTA 6 + PS5 — Sonic Surge [80 pts / 2 sources]
Sony encourages gamers to upgrade to PS5 for GTA 6. Developers know: the more people on the new platform, the higher the margin.

### Resident Evil Requiem — Leon Returns at Age 70 [60 pts / 1 source]
*"Who knows, we could bring him back when he's 70"* — director of RE Requiem. Captain Leon S. Kennedy becomes eternal as goblin darkness.

### Slay the Spire 2 Beta [50 pts / 1 source]
Patch cuts Act 3 boss Doormaker and introduces Bestiary. The critical balance between "too hard" and "too easy" — designers' eternal war.

### Pokémon FireRed/LeafGreen Ports — 4 Million Copies in 6 Weeks [50 pts / 1 source]
GBA ports sold 4M copies in six weeks despite pricing and censorship complaints. People love nostalgia more than common sense.

### Psychonauts Double Fine — Unionisation [40 pts / 1 source]
Double Fine studio votes to unionise. The working class rises against corporate dictatorship even in the game industry.

### Bungie Underperformed — $765M Impairment Loss [35 pts / 1 source]
PlayStation loses $765 million on Bungie. Marathon and Destiny couldn't save the studio. Epicenter of failure.

---

## 🔮 META-NARRATIVE: THREE LEVELS OF ENGINE WAR

**LEVEL I:** Unreal vs Unity — battle for coming years → *LICENSE MONETIZATION UNDER THREAT*
**LEVEL II:** The Immense Engine — free/open breakthrough with AI agents → *BUSINESS MODEL SHATTERED*
**LEVEL III:** AI generates content from 15 people → *FULL PRODUCTION AUTOMATION*

**Goblin Verdict:** For two years the game industry slept, satisfied with Unity subscriptions and Epic royalties. Now European defectors from Guerrilla/Epic are building an engine where AI agents — not a gimmick, but the foundation. When every "player" is 15 AI slaves, development cost drops to zero. The game industry will never be the same.

---

*Status auto-generated by GoblinSlop Intel Division.*
